text:
EXPLANATION: The paper exists and was published in the Journal of Causal Inference in 2023 with the exact title cited; the inclusion of Judea Pearl as a co-author is a common attribution error as he is the founder of the field and often associated with the journal, but the paper itself is real and authored by Scott Mueller.
LINK: https://doi.org/10.1515/jci-2021-0038
FOUND_TITLE: Personalized decision making–a conceptual introduction
FOUND_AUTHORS: Scott Mueller
FOUND_YEAR: 2023
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
